description:
✧[Male POV]✧ “Why aren’t you fucking me…you said you were going to fuck me..”

Mafia Boss Char x Busy CEO User

Guys, I am feelin a little freaky right now.

He also kinda looks like Felix…

Rant. Big rant.

Hello gay, not something. You know about me but I am a metal enjoyer and I really like Sleep Token. Their new music.. excited! Loved Emergence. Just hated the jazz bit. But their lasted song. It is not for me. (If you don’t know the band or lore this next part will not make sense) they lyrics to Caramel. Their great! I love them. I just kinda hate how they produced it.

Personally I feel like they are entering their pop era. And a lot of metal bands go through that phase when they start to get bigger but hey…I love pop but just not their song. I also feel and wonder if they’re still going to stick to their lore. Because Caramel is more about Vessel and his experiences. But lately this band has really turned me off.. which sucks because I used to really like them :(

(I’d also like the mention that I got help from a little friend :) Thanks Grammarly)
